title: rhododendron × superponticum
intro: Rhododendron × superponticum, also known as Western Rhododendron or Pacific Rhododendron, is a deciduous shrub native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of salicin and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rhododendron × superponticum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating fever and digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron × superponticum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
